title: Darrah Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Darrah Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Rajasthan

overview.short: Darrah Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected area located in Kota and Jhalawar districts, in Southeast Rajasthan, India.
overview.description: Darrah Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected area located in Kota and Jhalawar districts, in Southeast Rajasthan, India. It was declared a wildlife sanctuary in 1955 and later incorporated into the Mukundara Hills National Park in 2004. The sanctuary covers an area of about 227.63 km² and lies between the Chambal River and Mukundara Hills.

topPlaces.name: Battle of Mukandwara Pass
topPlaces.description: The Battle of Mukandwara Pass, also known as the Battle of Mokandra Pass or Monson's Retreat, was fought from 8 to 10 July 1804 between forces of the Indore Maharaja Yashwantrao Holkar, a member of the Maratha Confederacy and British East India Company forces under Colonel William Monson supported by Kotah kingdom during the Second Anglo-Maratha War. It was fought just to the south of the Mukandwara Pass, about 50 kilometres (31 mi).

items.note: The Battle of Mukandwara Pass, also known as the Battle of Mokandra Pass or Monson's Retreat, was fought from 8 to 10 July 1804 between forces of the Indore Maharaja Yashwantrao Holkar, a member of the Maratha Confederacy and British East India Company forces under Colonel William Monson supported by Kotah kingdom during the Second Anglo-Maratha War. It was fought just to the south of the Mukandwara Pass, about 50 kilometres (31 mi).

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Darrah Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Darrah Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Darrah Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kota Airport (38 km) and the nearest railway station is Kota Junction (42 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Darrah Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Darrah Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Darrah Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Darrah Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Darrah Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Battle of Mukandwara Pass.
